finding_results.notes: Kept one clear late-scene setup mention of the short-cycling refrigerator and one closing payoff. Replaced the intervening callbacks with steam, crew behavior, and practical repair detail so the chapter's return-home meaning is not carried by the same motor image three times over.

summary: Reduced the compressor motif overinsistence in the final third while preserving the setup/payoff structure and the chapter's same-place-changed-meaning close.
